description: Apple Pay integration via PayPal JS SDK for Expanded Checkout

requirements.merchant: Must register Apple Pay domain with PayPal
requirements.browser: Safari on macOS/iOS (Apple Pay JS API)
requirements.ssl: HTTPS required — Apple Pay does not work on HTTP

v6_pattern.initialization: const sdkInstance = await window.paypal.createInstance({ clientToken, components: ['applepay-payments'] })
flow: 3. Create Apple Pay session via SDK
5. Buyer authenticates with Face ID / Touch ID

best_practices: Only show Apple Pay button on supported devices/browsers
Always provide alternative payment methods (PayPal, card)
Complete domain verification before going live
Test on real Apple devices in sandbox
